name: @marttinn/screenshotter
description: Local-first macOS screenshot optimizer for AI coding agents.

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check && npm run pack:dry-run
scripts.check: node --check index.mjs && node --check bin/screenshotter.mjs && node --check bin/screenshotter-mcp.mjs && node --check extensions/screenshotter/index.js && node --check scripts/smoke-test.mjs && node --check scripts/performance-smoke-test.mjs && node --check scripts/pi-extension-smoke-test.mjs && node --check scripts/mcp-smoke-test.mjs && node --check scripts/context-adversarial-test.mjs && node --check scripts/accessibility-provider-eval.mjs && node --check scripts/swift-typecheck.mjs && node --check scripts/quality-check.mjs && node --check scripts/model-quality-check.mjs && node --check scripts/text-scale-eval.mjs && node --check scripts/text-source-benchmark.mjs && node --check scripts/poc-benchmarks.mjs && node --check scripts/rival-eval.mjs && npm run check:swift && npm run test
scripts.test: node scripts/smoke-test.mjs && node scripts/performance-smoke-test.mjs && node scripts/pi-extension-smoke-test.mjs && node scripts/mcp-smoke-test.mjs && node scripts/context-adversarial-test.mjs
